channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Boxing star Amanda Serrano signs lifetime deal with Jake Paul-backed promotion
item.description: Amanda Serrano, who claimed the hearts of boxing fans everywhere with her fight against Katie Taylor in November, has signed a lifetime deal with Most Valuable Promotions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: In Lake Placid, a pair of athletes are sliding for Ukraine. They hope better days are ahead
item.description: LAKE PLACID, N.Y. (AP) — The final race of the headfirst-sliding sport known as skeleton awaits Ukrainian athletes Vladyslav Heraskevych and Yaroslav Lavreniuk. After that, they're going home. They don't know what awaits when they get there.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cowboys and defensive tackle Osa Odighizuwa agree on $80M, 4-year contract, agent says
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys and defensive tackle Osa Odighizuwa agreed Tuesday on an $80 million, four-year contract with $58 million guaranteed, his agent said. The agreement came a few hours before the deadline for clubs to apply the franchise tag on one player.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Eagles make Barkley highest-paid running back with 2-year, $41.2M deal, AP source says
item.description: Saquon Barkley will become the highest-paid running back in NFL history after his record-setting season helped the Philadelphia Eagles win the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James to become first to score 50,000 combined points in NBA regular season and playoffs
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James will soon become the first player in NBA history to score 50,000 combined points in the regular season and postseason. If James suits up Tuesday night, he'll need just one point to set the mark during the Los Angeles Lakers' game against the New Orleans Pelicans.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets releasing wide receiver Davante Adams as new regime continues roster overhaul, AP source says
item.description: A person with knowledge of the decision tells The Associated Press the New York Jets are releasing wide receiver Davante Adams ahead of the start of the NFL’s new league year next week.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner climbed the world's 14 highest peaks without oxygen or porters
item.description: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner, an Austrian-born mountaineer, became the first woman to climb the world's 14 highest peaks without the help of oxygen or porters.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Bears to send 6th-round draft pick to Rams for veteran OL Jonah Jackson
item.description: Offensive line is generally considered the Bears' biggest position of need this offseason. They're reportedly addressing that before free agency even begins by agreeing to trade for a player familiar with new head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Mavericks star Kyrie Irving has a torn ACL and is out for the season
item.description: Dallas Mavericks star Kyrie Irving has a torn ACL in his left knee and will miss the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: Schuyler Dixon, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: WNBA champion invests in Bay Area sports franchise
item.description: (KRON) – WNBA champion and Bay Area native Sabrina Ionescu was announced as an investor and commercial advisor for the Bay Football Club. Ionescu, who is also a three-time All-Star and Olympic gold medalist, announced her involvement with Bay FC on Instagram.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Filipowski scores 25, but Jazz lose to Detroit, 134-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cade Cunningham had 29 points, nine assists and four steals, and the Detroit Pistons beat the Utah Jazz 134-106 on Monday night for their 10th win in 11 games. The Jazz committed 27 turnovers end a season-long nine-gam homestand with a record of 3-6.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cryer scores 22 points and No. 3 Houston beats Kansas 65-59 for 9th straight win
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — L.J. Cryer scored 22 points and No. 3 Houston won its ninth straight game with a 65-59 victory over Kansas on Monday night. Emanuel Sharp added 12 points off the bench, including two free throws that pushed Houston's lead to 63-59 with 20 seconds left.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cooper Flagg, No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 to claim at least share of ACC regular-season crown
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Freshman Cooper Flagg had 28 points, eight rebounds and seven assists in possibly his final home game, helping No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 on Monday night to clinch at least a share of the Atlantic Coast Conference regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC officials denounce homophobic chant heard at inaugural home match
item.description: "What took place during our first-ever home match does not reflect who we are as a club or the values we stand for," SDFC officials said in a statement Monday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC will take steps to stop the homophobic chant that marred its inaugural home match
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — San Diego FC intends to take steps to discourage its fans from engaging in the homophobic chant that marred the Major League Soccer expansion club's inaugural home match last weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiger Woods cheers, shares heartwarming hug with daughter Sam after she wins Florida state soccer title
item.description: Tiger Woods was the one in the gallery cheering on Saturday, as his daughter Sam played a major role in The Benjamin School winning the girls varsity soccer state title.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Girls Soccer CIFSDS Open Division Championship: San Marcos 2, Bonita Vista 1
item.description: The CIFSDS Open Division Girls Soccer Championship was held at Mission Bay High School between the San Marcos Knights (17-4-3) and the Bonita Vista Barons (12-5-2).
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Commanders acquire wide receiver Deebo Samuel in a trade with the 49ers, AP source says
item.description: The Washington Commanders have acquired wide receiver Deebo Samuel from the San Francisco 49ers for a fifth-round pick, pending a physical, according to a person with knowledge of the trade.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ex-NFLer Chris Kluwe says he was fired from job after MAGA protest
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe said he was fired from his high school football coaching position after a MAGA plaque protest.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation
